title: Digital-Twin Siamese GRU for Similarity-Aware Multi-Objective Power Grid Dispatch under Load and Topology Uncertainty
strongest_claim: RTS-GMLC fixed/rolling dispatch proxy and high-renewable stress subset support DSTAR-GRU narrowly.
boundary: Not AC-OPF or unit-commitment proof; topology-control validation remains pending.

title: Hyperbolic Graph Neural Forecasting for Hierarchical Power Load Prediction in Smart Dispatch Systems
strongest_claim: OPSD and SimBench rolling evidence support day-ahead/24h hierarchical load forecasting.
boundary: Do not claim 1h superiority; claims should focus on day-ahead/24h behavior.
next_validation: Add stronger neural short-horizon baselines only if 1h claims are needed.

title: Self-Adaptive Multi-Objective Differential Evolution for Reproducible Distribution Network Planning with DER and Storage Integration
strongest_claim: SimBench DER/storage stress proxy supports CARS-MODE narrowly after preserving weak revisions.
boundary: Not AC/pandapower feasible planning proof; proxy hypervolume gain is narrow.
next_validation: Add pandapower/AC load-flow and repeated DER-hosting scenario variance.

title: Scenario-Aware Hybrid Multi-Objective Evolution for Resilient Distribution Network Planning under DER and Load Uncertainty
strongest_claim: SimBench resilience-planning proxy supports SHIELD-MOEA against baseline and ablation.
boundary: Scenario proxy lacks full AC/pandapower feasibility and scenario variance.
next_validation: Add AC/pandapower feasibility and repeated scenario variance.

title: Hybrid Multi-Objective Evolution for Traceable Power Grid Feasibility Review and Investment Effectiveness Optimization
strongest_claim: RTS-GMLC + SimBench + NERC-report-cache project-review proxy supports TRACE-MOEA.
boundary: Benchmark-derived review proxy lacks expert-labeled approval outcomes and calibrated costs.
next_validation: Add expert-labeled feasibility-review outcomes and cost calibration.

title: Non-Dominated Sorting with Bidirectional Local Search for Budget-Constrained Power Grid Project Review
strongest_claim: Budget-constrained project-review proxy supports BiLo-NSGA and bidirectional local search.
boundary: Benchmark-derived project-review proxy lacks expert labels and enterprise validation.
next_validation: Add expert-labeled review outcomes, dependency labels, and calibrated budget cases.
